message:
feat(ru): add WebSocket events for real-time RU updates

- Add FleetChannel types to channels.ts for fleet:repos, fleet:sync,
  fleet:sweep, and session-specific channels
- Create ru-events.ts publisher utility with typed event data interfaces
  and centralized publish functions for all RU operations
- Wire up publishers in ru-fleet.service.ts for repo add/remove/update
- Wire up publishers in ru-sync.service.ts for sync lifecycle events
- Wire up publishers in ru-sweep.service.ts for sweep phase progress

This enables real-time WebSocket notifications for fleet management,
sync operations, and agent sweep workflows.

Closes: flywheel_gateway-c9u

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
